title: [JENKINS-72627] Improve locale parsing for loading of localised help files
issue_text:
<!-- Comment:
A great PR typically begins with the line below.
Replace XXXXX with the numeric part of the issue ID you created in Jira.
Note that if you want your changes backported into LTS, you need to create a Jira issue. See https://www.jenkins.io/download/lts/#backporting-process for more information.
-->

See [JENKINS-72627](https://issues.jenkins.io/browse/JENKINS-72627).

### Testing done

Add some automated unit testing.

Also, manually tested it.

1. Install [dingtalk plugin](https://plugins.jenkins.io/dingding-notifications/), version `2.7.1`
2. run cmd `curl -H "Accept-Language:zh,zh-CN;q=0.9,en;q=0.8" http://localhost:8080/jenkins/descriptor/io.jenkins.plugins.DingTalkRobotConfig/help/id`

Before modify, return 404 page
After modify, return `help-id_zh_CN.html` text.
```
机器人 id，可以在 pipeline 中使用；留空会自动生成，手动填写请保证唯一性
```

PS: Because the `help-id_zh_CN.html` file is missing in version `2.7.1` of `dingtalk-plugin` , It is reasonable to return a 404 before modify.

```
# in ~/dingtalk-plugin/src/main on git:main x [12:31:30] 
$ tree resources 
resources
├── index.jelly
└── io
    └── jenkins
        └── plugins
 ...
            ├── DingTalkRobotConfig
            │   ├── config.jelly
            │   ├── help-id_zh_CN.html
            │   ├── help-key_zh_CN.html
            │   └── help-name_zh_CN.html

```

### Proposed changelog entries

- JENKINS-72627, Improve locale parsing for loading of localised help files
